tasks.task_goal: Serve 4 bowls of chicken soup from a stockpot
tasks.expected_outcome: Four bowls are filled evenly with soup without spilling
unconventional_tools: small saucepan with a pour spout and long handle
heat-resistant glass measuring cup (e.g., 4-cup Pyrex) with spout
metal ice scoop with a tapered pouring edge
opposite_tool_attributes: shallow, flat head with no concavity
short, non-heat-resistant handle that conducts heat or melts
very small volume capacity (teaspoon-sized), inadequate for serving

tasks.task_goal: Portion 8 scoops of ice cream into waffle cones at a birthday party
tasks.expected_outcome: Each cone receives a rounded serving that releases cleanly from the tool
required_tool_attributes: sharpened leading edge to cut into frozen dessert
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible, flat pad instead of a hemispherical rigid bowl
dull, rounded edge that smears rather than cuts into frozen dessert
no handle or a slippery, non-ergonomic grip with no release mechanism

tasks.task_goal: Remove clumped waste from a cat's litter tray into a trash bag
tasks.expected_outcome: Clumps are lifted and separated while clean litter falls back into the tray
required_tool_attributes: tapered front edge to slide under clumps
opposite_tool_attributes: solid, non-slotted flat or convex surface with no basket shape
soft, flexible construction that bends under load
rounded, blunt leading edge and inline/no handle (no leverage)

tasks.task_goal: Fill a sandcastle bucket with damp beach sand
tasks.expected_outcome: Bucket is packed with sufficient sand for molding
required_tool_attributes: wide concave blade with raised sides
unconventional_tools: plastic measuring cup with pour spout
opposite_tool_attributes: flat or convex surface with no raised sides to contain sand
flimsy, flexible, or absent handle that collapses under load
thick, blunt leading edge that cannot cut into compacted sand

tasks.task_goal: Transfer 2 cups of flour from a paper bag to a mixing bowl
tasks.expected_outcome: Accurate flour quantity is moved without tearing the bag or spilling
unconventional_tools: Small saucepan with internal cup/ounce markings
opposite_tool_attributes: uncalibrated container with no volume markings and/or non-concave form
flexible, collapsible body that deforms under load
rounded or serrated rim that cannot be leveled flush

tasks.task_goal: Skim floating leaves from a backyard koi pond into a yard waste bin
tasks.expected_outcome: Pond surface is cleared of leaves while water drains back into the pond
required_tool_attributes: deep mesh pocket forming a concave container
unconventional_tools: large fine-mesh kitchen strainer (sieve) with handle
opposite_tool_attributes: flat, non-concave surface with no pocket
flexible, non-rigid rim/frame that collapses
coarse, wide-gap mesh that lets leaves pass through

tasks.task_goal: Bail rainwater out of a canoe after a storm
tasks.expected_outcome: Water level is reduced enough for safe paddling
required_tool_attributes: large hollow cavity for volume support
unconventional_tools: plastic milk jug with the bottom cut off
opposite_tool_attributes: non-hollow or perforated body that cannot hold water
soft, flexible, absorbent material (not rigid or waterproof)
rounded, lipless rim that fails to direct outflow

tasks.task_goal: Load 30 grams of coffee beans from a storage jar into a grinder
tasks.expected_outcome: Correct bean amount is placed in the grinder hopper without spillage
opposite_tool_attributes: flat or convex head (no small concave bowl)
soft, flexible, non-food-safe material (not rigid and food-safe)
no capacity markings for measurement

tasks.task_goal: Collect a pile of sawdust from under a table saw into a trash bin
tasks.expected_outcome: Workbench area is cleared of loose sawdust
required_tool_attributes: wide front lip that sits flush to the floor
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible, floppy body that collapses instead of staying rigid
narrow, rounded leading edge that cannot sit flush to the floor
deep or perforated container lacking a shallow pan with raised sides

tasks.task_goal: Transfer granular lawn fertilizer from a bag into a broadcast spreader
tasks.expected_outcome: Spreader hopper is filled without spilling granules onto the lawn
required_tool_attributes: tapered mouth for easier entry into the bag
unconventional_tools: empty plastic milk jug cut diagonally to create a handled scoop
large plastic measuring cup with a pouring spout
deep plastic dustpan with a pour lip
opposite_tool_attributes: flat, non-concave or perforated head that cannot retain granules
rust-prone or chemically reactive material that corrodes with fertilizer salts
wide, non-tapered mouth that cannot enter the bag opening without spilling

tasks.task_goal: Fill six seedling pots with potting mix from a large sack
tasks.expected_outcome: Pots are evenly filled and ready for planting
required_tool_attributes: curved cupped blade with high sides
pointed tip to penetrate compacted mix
opposite_tool_attributes: flat, shallow surface with no high sides
flexible or soft construction that collapses under load
blunt, rounded tip that cannot penetrate compacted mix
impossible_tools: colander or strainer with large holes

tasks.task_goal: Serve steamed rice from a cooker into four plates
tasks.expected_outcome: Neat portions of rice are placed on each plate without sticking
opposite_tool_attributes: flat or perforated head instead of a shallow concave paddle
sticky, absorbent, high-friction surface instead of a nonstick textured surface
heat-sensitive, flexible head with an overly long, unwieldy handle instead of heat-resistant rigidity and a short handle

tasks.task_goal: Move rock salt from a storage bucket to a handheld spreader for de-icing steps
tasks.expected_outcome: Spreader is loaded without contaminating or spilling salt
unconventional_tools: plastic measuring cup with pouring spout
repurposed plastic milk jug cut into a scoop
opposite_tool_attributes: flat or shallow, non-concave surface that can't contain granules
rust-prone or absorbent material (e.g., untreated steel or cardboard) that degrades with salt
no pouring spout and a blunt rim that prevents controlled transfer

tasks.task_goal: Add aquarium gravel from a bag into a new fish tank
tasks.expected_outcome: Gravel is deposited evenly without scratching the glass
opposite_tool_attributes: flat or convex surface without a narrow, concave bowl
reactive, water-unsafe material (corrodes or leaches toxins)
soft, flexible structure that collapses under load

tasks.task_goal: Remove cooled ash from a wood stove into a metal ash bucket
tasks.expected_outcome: Firebox is cleared and ash is securely contained in the bucket
required_tool_attributes: shallow wide metal scoop with raised sides
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible head without raised sides (e.g., fabric or silicone)
short, combustible handle (plastic/wood) lacking heat resistance
rounded or perforated, non-rigid surface that cannot scoop or retain ash

tasks.task_goal: Portion muffin batter evenly into a 12-cup tin
tasks.expected_outcome: Each cup is filled to the same level with minimal drips
opposite_tool_attributes: flat or perforated head with no concave bowl
no built-in sweep/release; sticky or porous contact surface
soft, flexible, absorbent, non-food-safe material without a rigid one-handed handle

tasks.task_goal: Clear a path on a deck by moving drifted powdery snow into a pile
tasks.expected_outcome: A walkable path is opened with snow piled off to the side
opposite_tool_attributes: narrow, shallow blade with no sidewalls
short or no handle that provides little leverage
heavy, flexible, rough-surfaced material that sticks to snow

tasks.task_goal: Measure and pour 2 cups of dry dog kibble into a feeding bowl
tasks.expected_outcome: Correct portion is delivered to the bowl without spilling
opposite_tool_attributes: shallow, flexible or collapsible body instead of a deep, rigid scoop
no handle or a slick surface that prevents a secure grip
uneven or rounded rim that cannot be leveled for accurate measuring

tasks.task_goal: Collect a small soil sample from a riverbank into a specimen bag
tasks.expected_outcome: A representative soil sample is obtained with minimal contamination
opposite_tool_attributes: flat or convex surface instead of a small concave blade
soft, flexible construction (e.g., cloth/rubber) instead of rigid metal
blunt, rounded edge with no point to penetrate soil

tasks.task_goal: Load ice from an ice bin into a cocktail shaker at a bar
tasks.expected_outcome: Shaker is filled with the required ice cubes without hand contact or spillage
opposite_tool_attributes: flat, shallow surface that cannot contain ice
solid, unperforated scoop that traps meltwater
soft, flexible, absorbent, non-food-safe material
